attache_response.description: Your reply in character as the Attaché of the Existential Detective Agency. This is what the user will see in the main chat column.

baseline_conversation_state.description: Finite state flags for the Baseline process. Exactly one of these booleans should be true at any given time.

repition_intro.description: True when you are introducing and asking questions from the Repetition Intro section. This should be true at the very start of the Baseline.

honest_questions.description: True when you are asking Honest Questions.

high_intensity.description: True when you are asking High Intensity questions.

end.description: True when the Baseline is complete or should be stopped (for example, if the user declines to continue). When this is true, all other flags should be false.
